headline: Bazoumana Touré
body: 🚨⚪️⚫️ Newcastle agree €50m package deal to sign Ivorian winger Bazoumana Touré, here we go! Agreement sealed with player’s agents and Hoffenheim after official bid submitted today, as TeleFootball reports. Touré will sign a long term deal at NUFC this week.
raw_text:
🚨⚪️⚫️ Newcastle agree €50m package deal to sign Ivorian winger Bazoumana Touré, here we go!

Agreement sealed with player’s agents and Hoffenheim after official bid submitted today, as @TeleFootball reports.

Touré will sign a long term deal at #NUFC this week.
text:
🚨⚪️⚫️ Newcastle agree €50m package deal to sign Ivorian winger Bazoumana Touré, here we go!

Agreement sealed with player’s agents and Hoffenheim after official bid submitted today, as @TeleFootball reports.

Touré will sign a long term deal at #NUFC this week.
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- BAZOUMANA TOURÉ CONFIRMED TRANSFER TO NEWCASTLE UNITED.
💰 PRICE — €50M
📝 CONTRACT — TBD

#NUFC #TransferNews #PremierLeague #FPL
